title: Warren – run isolated instances of any CLI tool (no containers,no root)
abstract: Tired of running CLI tools on machines that don't support containers without root access? Enter Warren. Think of it as your personal lab where you can freely test those tricky CLI tools with zero setup hassle. No more complicated configurations—just move right in!
abstract_zh: 你还在为在不支持容器的电脑上运行命令行工具而烦恼吗？Warren来了！它就像一个私人实验室，让你随心所欲地测试那些棘手的CLI工具，无需任何root权限。告别繁琐配置，直接拎包入住！
